name: No-Castling Chess
author: Vladimir Kramnik (2019) / AGP port
description: Standard chess with castling forbidden for both sides -- Vladimir Kramnik's 2019 variant, intended to cut opening theory and make king safety harder to achieve. Every other rule (en passant, pawn double-step, promotion to Q/R/B/N, check, checkmate, stalemate, and the usual draws) is identical to orthodox chess. White (player 0) moves first.
